title: RRI Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 06 Engineering Trainee Posts
description: The Raman Research Institute (RRI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 Engineering Trainee Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Electronics Engineering can apply for the RRI Notification 2026 . Interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, a...
